results.rendered_html:
samavāyin (von samavāya) adj.
1〉 aus einer Verbindung (der humores) bestehend: jvara  SUŚR. 2,424,21 . — puruṣa  YĀJÑ. 3,125  nach  STENZLER  der individuelle Mann.
— 2〉 in innigstem Zusammenhange stehend, inhärent  KAṆ. 1,1,15 . 3,1,9 . 7,2,19 . 9,2,1 . 10,1,6 .  TARKAS. 22 .  NĪLAK. 37 . 94 .  SUŚR. 1,147,17 .  ŚAṂK. _zu_ BṚH. ĀR. UP. S. 171 . 250 .  KUSUM. 18,18 . 19,9 . 10 .  KAIYY. _zu_ PAT. _bei_ GOLD. MĀN. 48 .  SARVADARŚANAS. 105,19 . samavāyikāraṇatā 132,8 . ˚kāraṇatva 106,15 .  BHĀṢĀP. 16 . a˚  KAṆ. 5,2,24 .  TARKAS. 16. fg.   NĪLAK. 94 .  BHĀṢĀP. 122 . asamavāyihetutva 16. avayavasamavāyitva  SARVADARŚANAS. 30,4 . asamavāyitva  BHĀṢĀP. 96 .

results.rendered_html:
samavāyin a.
1 Closely or intimately connected.
2 Multitudinous.
Comp.
— kāraṇaṃ inseparable cause, the material cause (one of the three kinds of kāraṇa mentioned in Vaiśeshika phil.).
